segments.text: To you I lift up my eyes, O you who are enthroned in the heavens!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Behold, as the eyes of servants look to the hand of their master, as the eyes of a maidservant to the hand of her mistress, so our eyes look to the LORD our God, till he has mercy upon us.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Have mercy upon us, O LORD, have mercy upon us, for we have had more than enough of contempt.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Our soul has had more than enough of the scorn of those who are at ease, of the contempt of the proud.
segments.speaker: Psalmist
